use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and user menus
Showing user avatars in comment sections, reviews, or chat interfaces
Creating user lists in team management dashboards and member directories
Building social media user cards with circular profile images
Displaying speaker or author images in event and blog layouts
ai_summary: A collection of circular avatar components built on Radix UI Avatar primitives, designed to showcase user profile images with loading fallbacks. Features multiple sizes (24px to 64px) with lazy-loaded image fallback to initials, providing a clean and accessible user identity display suitable for any application requiring profile picture representation.
